title: Atlassian MCP Config
description: Configuration file for the atlassian-mcp MCP server

jira.description: Self-hosted Jira Server / Data Center connection settings

url.description: Base URL of your Jira instance, e.g. https://jira.example.com

token.description: Personal Access Token (PAT) for Jira Server authentication

defaultProject.description: Default Jira project key used when project is not specified, e.g. "FOO"

bitbucket.description: Self-hosted Bitbucket Server / Data Center connection settings

url.description: Base URL of your Bitbucket instance, e.g. https://bitbucket.example.com

token.description: Personal Access Token (PAT) for Bitbucket Server authentication

defaultProject.description: Default Bitbucket project key used when projectKey is not specified, e.g. "MYPROJ"

defaultRepo.description: Default repository slug used when repoSlug is not specified, e.g. "my-api"
